"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\nc-shell.dir/objects.a
D:\CLION2~1.2\bin\mingw\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\nc-shell.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\nc-shell.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\CLION2~1.2\bin\mingw\bin\G__~1.EXE -g -Wall -Wextra -Werror -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-attributes -O0 -ggdb -fsanitize=address -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fno-optimize-sibling-calls -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\nc-shell.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o ..\..\bin\bustub-nc-shell.exe -Wl,--out-implib,..\..\lib\libbustub-nc-shell.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\nc-shell.dir\linkLibs.rsp
